headline: Oil Giants Bid $163 Million in Trump’s Record Alaska Lease Sale
summary: The auction, the first in Alaska’s National Petroleum Reserve since 2019, saw companies submit about 430 bids across more than 1.3 million acres, indicating high interest in an area that was restricted during the Biden administration.  “The results of today’s sale are historic,” said Kevin Pendergast, the state director for the US Bureau of Land Management in Alaska.

raw.headline: Oil Giants Bid $163 Million in Trump’s Record Alaska Lease Sale
raw.summary: The auction, the first in Alaska’s National Petroleum Reserve since 2019, saw companies submit about 430 bids across more than 1.3 million acres, indicating high interest in an area that was restricted during the Biden administration.  “The results of today’s sale are historic,” said Kevin Pendergast, the state director for the US Bureau of Land Management in Alaska.
